summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Maestro EGP Iteration 7 features - HR System and Warehouse Transfers. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend pages for HR (/hr) and Warehouse (/warehouse) load correctly with all tabs and functionality working.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for successful creation - minor HTTP status code inconsistency

passed_tests: Backend: Tenant Admin login (ahmed@albait.com) - 200 OK
Backend: Main Admin login (admin@maestroegp.com) - 200 OK
Backend: POST /api/users - Creates user with tenant_id from creator
Backend: GET /api/users - Returns users filtered by tenant_id
Backend: GET /api/employees - Returns employees list
Backend: POST /api/employees - Creates employee with tenant_id
Backend: GET /api/employees/{id} - Returns employee by ID
Backend: GET /api/attendance - Returns attendance records
Backend: POST /api/attendance - Creates attendance record with worked_hours calculation
Backend: GET /api/advances - Returns advances list
Backend: POST /api/advances - Creates advance with monthly_deduction calculation
Backend: GET /api/deductions - Returns deductions list
Backend: POST /api/deductions - Creates deduction record
Backend: GET /api/bonuses - Returns bonuses list
Backend: POST /api/bonuses - Creates bonus record
Backend: GET /api/payroll - Returns payroll records for month
Backend: POST /api/payroll/calculate - Calculates payroll with deductions/bonuses
Backend: GET /api/inventory-transfers - Returns transfers list
Backend: POST /api/inventory-transfers - Creates transfer with pending status
Backend: GET /api/purchase-requests - Returns purchase requests list
Backend: POST /api/purchase-requests - Creates purchase request with pending status
Frontend: HR page (/hr) loads with all 6 tabs (Employees, Attendance, Advances, Deductions, Bonuses, Payroll)
Frontend: HR page shows stats cards (active employees, total salaries, pending advances, deductions, bonuses)
Frontend: HR page displays employee list with actions (edit, delete, calculate payroll)
Frontend: HR page Advances tab shows advances with status badges
Frontend: Warehouse page (/warehouse) loads with 2 tabs (Inventory Transfers, Purchase Requests)
Frontend: Warehouse page shows stats cards (completed transfers, pending requests, in delivery, pending transfers)
Frontend: Warehouse page displays transfers list with status and actions
Frontend: New Transfer dialog opens with transfer type, source, destination, items selection
Frontend: Dashboard shows quick action buttons for HR and Warehouse
critical_code_review_comments: User creation with tenant_id fix is working correctly - new users inherit tenant_id from creator
HR system fully implemented with employees, attendance, advances, deductions, bonuses, and payroll
Inventory transfers system working with status workflow (pending -> approved -> shipped -> received)
Purchase requests system working with priority levels and status workflow
All HR and Warehouse APIs properly filter data by tenant_id for multi-tenant isolation
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing: TEST_Employee_*, TEST_user_*, test attendance/advances/deductions/bonuses/transfers/purchase requests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 7 features tested and working: 1) User creation fix - new users created by tenant admin now correctly inherit tenant_id from creator. 2) HR System at /hr with 6 tabs: Employees (CRUD), Attendance (check-in/out with worked hours calculation), Advances (سلف with monthly deduction), Deductions (خصومات), Bonuses (مكافآت), Payroll (كشوفات الرواتب with calculation). 3) Warehouse/Transfers at /warehouse with 2 tabs: Inventory Transfers (with status workflow: pending->approved->shipped->received) and Purchase Requests (with priority levels: urgent/high/normal/low). All APIs properly implement multi-tenant isolation via tenant_id filtering.
